id.description: Stable, dotted ID. Convention: <RoundPrefix>.<ENTITY>.<DETAIL> (e.g. C2.PENDING.payment_succeeded, INV.NO_OVERSUBSCRIPTION, A8.ENV.ntp_sync).

note.description: Faithful prose rendering of the record. 1-3 short sentences. Must match the data: no added facts, no omitted material facts. See _NOTE_CONVENTION.md.

rationale.description: The WHY behind the decision. Free-form, may be long. Distinct from _note (which is the WHAT).
